title: Codereview pass 3: tun.rs SAFETY
description:
Review findings from codereview pass 3

Final review focusing on edge cases and completeness:

**Findings:**
1. All unsafe blocks covered: open, ioctl, close (x2), fcntl (x2), from_raw_fd, read, write = 9 unsafe keyword usages covering 10 operations
2. Error handling paths properly close fd before returning errors
3. SAFETY comments are appropriately concise while explaining key invariants
4. Comments follow Rust unsafe documentation conventions (// SAFETY: prefix)

**Verification:**
- Counted unsafe blocks: 9 occurrences (fcntl appears twice in one condition)
- All have SAFETY comments preceding them

**No issues found in pass 3. SAFETY documentation is complete and accurate.**
close_reason: SAFETY comment review - existing code is correct
